description: CompositionMaroon check shirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with a mid-arm button, a spread collar with a full buttoned placket, two patch pockets with flap and button closure on the chest, appliqué work on the left chest and a curved hemFitSlimWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryClassic off-duty style shirt from s.oliver for the style maven who knows that a fashionable wardrobe is built from the basics. This check shirt is a fashion essential. Wear this with classic blue jeans and casual shoes.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
